#  Link RFIs on a Drawing (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Tap the drawing you want to create and attach an RFI to.
  4. In the markup toolbar, tap the shape or line you want to add. See [Mark up a Drawing (iOS).](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-ios)
  5. After placing the markup, tap **Link**.
  6. Tap **Link an RFI**.
  7. Choose one of the following options:
     * **Link an Existing RFI** :
       * Tap an existing RFI item to add it to the markup.
     * **Create a new RFI** :
       1. Tap ![Icon Plus Quick Create Mobile2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a27be202634839c76584fe365cc247fb/1c03472023e1b0974c6f7b58a4235d9d/icon-plus-quick-create-mobile2.png?fm=webp&h=20) to create a new RFI.
       2. Enter the necessary information.
       3. Tap **Save** to add the new item to the markup.
  8. _Optional:_ If you have 'Standard' or 'Admin' permissions on the Drawings tool and want to publish the markup:
     * Tap the markup, then tap **Publish**.  
See [What is the difference between personal and published drawing markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)


## See Also
  * [Create RFIs on a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/create-rfis-on-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Link Items to a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/link-items-to-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Drawings (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/permissions)
title: Link RFIs on a Drawing (iOS)
description: How to add RFIs to drawings on the Procore iOS app.
